message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts
Failing test: "2-year customer with single sword: 100 base + 10 first ins - 20 loyalty + 5 fee = 95 G"
Passing tests so far: 12

Spec: "Long-standing customers (>= 2 years of business with MHPCO) receive a 20% loyalty discount." This is a POLICY-WIDE modifier — applied to the policy base premium (sum of item base premiums).

So for this test: policy base = 100. Loyalty discount = -20% of 100 = -20. First insurance = +10% of 100 = +10. Item surcharges = 0. Fee = 5. Total = 100 - 20 + 10 + 0 + 5 = 95.

The customer info (yearsWithMHPCO) is in scenario.customer. Pass it through to quotePremium and apply the loyalty discount when yearsWithMHPCO >= 2.

All previous tests have yearsWithMHPCO: 0, so no loyalty applies — those should still pass.

Run `pnpm test` to verify all 13 pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the current state of the implementation and tests, then make the minimal change needed to pass the new test.
Now I'll make the minimal change to pass the loyalty discount test. The customer info needs to flow through to quotePremium, and apply -20% loyalty discount when yearsWithMHPCO >= 2.

content.text:
All 13 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_PERCENT = 20` and `LOYALTY_YEARS_THRESHOLD = 2` constants. Modified `quotePremium` to accept `customer` and subtract a 20% loyalty discount on the policy base when `yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`. Restructured the formula to add `firstInsurance` and subtract `loyaltyDiscount` separately rather than using `addPercent`, so the loyalty discount applies to the policy base (not to base + first-insurance).
- Result: All 13 tests pass (25 todo remaining).
- Approach: Minimal — passed `customer` through `runScenario` to `quotePremium`, added a single conditional for the loyalty discount, and reused the existing `percentOf` helper. Previous tests pass unchanged because all use `yearsWithMHPCO: 0`, leaving `loyaltyDiscount = 0` and the math equivalent to the previous `addPercent` form.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-17_03-23-26_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
